features: Scent Favourites Floral Burst Pour Femme EDT 100ml.
A floral explosion scent with addictive profusion of floral notes and warm woody undertones for true sensory bliss.
Sparkling top notes of tea, bergamot and freesia interwoven into a vibrant bouquet of sambac jasmine, cattleya orchid and centifolia rose.
